issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is too generic. The effect should trigger specifically 'OnTrash' or similar when a card is trashed from hand by an effect. Current trigger does not match the condition 'When a card is trashed from your hand by an effect'.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Text says 'during this turn' which should map to 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a critical duration distinction per rules.

Second effect missing cost condition. The [On Play] ability has a cost requirement of 'rest 2 of your DON!! cards' which must be represented as a condition or cost field, not simply an action sequence.
